decks.notes: This deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of artifact creatures and efficient artifact spells. By utilizing cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to synergize with artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, the deck can quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide disruption and protection, while Urza's Saga can help tutor for key artifacts. The deck's aggressive strategy is further supported by cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Weapons Manufacturing, making it a formidable force in the Modern format.

The deck focuses on using instant speed reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to quickly bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. These creatures provide strong synergies that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also utilizes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base includes a variety of lands to support the deck's color requirements and maximize consistency. The overall strategy revolves around comboing off with instant speed reanimation while controlling the game with disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It also incorporates tempo plays and card advantage through cards like Consign to Memory and Ephemerate. The deck also utilizes a mix of red and white mana sources to cast its powerful creatures, such as Phelia and Phlage, while also including some control elements like Surgical Extraction and Wrath of the Skies to handle threats from the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to maintain a disruptive and aggressive strategy to control the game and secure a victory.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a game-winning combo. Cards like Faithless Looting, Thought Scour, and Unearth help to quickly get creatures into the graveyard while Persist and Reanimate effects like Archon of Cruelty and Abhorrent Oculus allow for explosive comebacks. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's threats, making it a versatile and aggressive combo deck focused on reanimating powerful creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the Allosaurus Rider combo by using cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to search for the powerful Griselbrand or Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck also utilizes cards like Disciple of Freyalise and Generous Ent to ramp up mana quickly, while also including protection in the form of Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer. The goal is to create a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with efficient and explosive combos.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to deal quick damage to the opponent. The deck also has burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and finish off opponents. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer provide additional value and card advantage. The deck also includes cards like Blood Moon to disrupt opponents' mana bases. The goal of the deck is to apply consistent pressure and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on aggressive play with a mix of creatures and burn spells, aiming to quickly overwhelm the opponent with early creatures like Ragavan and Ocelot Pride, supported by removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer to create value and maintain pressure on the opponent. The mana base is built around fetching dual lands to ensure consistent access to the right colors of mana, allowing for a smooth and aggressive gameplay.

The deck focuses on utilizing various instant spells and combo pieces to reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand quickly and efficiently. It also includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to control the game and protect the combo. The land base includes fetch lands to ensure the right colors are available when needed. Overall, the deck aims to set up a game-winning combo by reanimating creatures with Goryo's Vengeance and utilizing instant spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck revolves around using cards like Eldritch Evolution, Neoform, and Summoner's Pact to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. It also utilizes combos like Nourishing Shoal and Griselbrand to gain life and dig deeper into the deck. The addition of cards like Veil of Summer and Pact of Negation helps protect the combo pieces. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large creatures and powerful synergies to quickly close out the game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early on with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge to deal direct damage to the opponent and clear any blockers in the way. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional value and card advantage. Overall, this deck aims to win the game swiftly through a combination of creature beatdown and burn spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and direct damage spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Key cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls provide early pressure, while Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge offer reach to finish off opponents. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and pump effects to help push through damage. The deck also includes disruption elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Blood Moon to disrupt opponents' game plans. Overall, the deck is built to be fast and relentless in its attack.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle, using efficient creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer provide card advantage and board presence, while Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge offer direct damage to the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury serve as powerful finishers, with the option of using Ranger-Captain of Eos to search for key creatures. The inclusion of some control elements like Thraben Charm and Static Prison helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining pressure.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying small, aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to deal damage to the opponent swiftly. The deck also includes powerful cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to strengthen the board presence and overwhelm the opponent. With efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, as well as disruptive cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Voice of Victory, this deck aims to control the battlefield and secure a fast victory before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay using a combination of creatures and spells to disrupt the opponent's resources and close out the game quickly. It includes powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with removal spells like Consign to Memory and Prismatic Ending to control the board. The deck also features card advantage with Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Meticulous Archive, as well as additional disruption with Quantum Riddler and Wrath of the Skies. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan.

The main concept of this Ruby Storm deck is to quickly generate mana and card advantage through cards like Desperate Ritual, Manamorphose, and Ral, Monsoon Mage, while setting up for explosive turns with Glimpse the Impossible and Past in Flames. The deck aims to combo off by chaining spells together and casting multiple spells in a single turn to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of powerful effects. Using Ral's ability and other card advantage options, the deck can consistently find its combo pieces and rapidly close out the game before the opponent can react effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to maximize artifact synergies and quickly establish a dominant board presence through aggressive plays. The deck aims to flood the board with artifact creatures and tokens while utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Claws of Gix to control the opponent's board. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga provide additional value and recursion for artifacts, while Mox Opal helps ramp up mana for explosive plays. Overall, the deck seeks to overwhelm opponents with a combination of speed, synergy, and disruption.
